groupings.title: Recommended Global Baseline
groupings.description: Broadly useful skills that are reasonable to install globally for general coding-agent work.

groupings.title: Optional Global Workflows
groupings.description: General workflow and review skills to install globally when they match your normal process.

groupings.title: Project-Specific Frontend
groupings.description: Frontend skills to install only in Svelte, SvelteKit, or UI-heavy projects where they apply.
